hooks.command: echo "Today: $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %A')" && echo "" && echo "=== Lessons ==" && cat tasks/lessons.md 2>/dev/null || true
echo "Today: $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %A')" && echo "" && echo "=== Lessons ==" && cat tasks/lessons.md 2>/dev/null || true

python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); cmd=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('command',''); dangers=[('rm -rf','rm -rf detected'),('git push --force','force push detected'),('git push -f','force push detected'),('git reset --hard','git reset --hard detected'),('git checkout -- ','git checkout -- detected (discards changes)')]; [sys.stderr.write(f'WARNING: {msg}. Review before proceeding.\n') for pat,msg in dangers if pat in cmd]"
